tools.name: create_guest_token
tools.description: Create a MiniURL guest token and store it in an unauthenticated MCP session. If auth is already set, keep it or call clear_authentication first. shorten_url can provision a guest automatically.

tools.name: authenticate_token
tools.description: Store an existing MiniURL token in the current MCP session. Accepts either a gt_ guest token or an mk_ API key.

tools.name: clear_authentication
tools.description: Clear any stored MiniURL authentication from the current MCP session.

tools.name: shorten_url
tools.description: Create a short URL. If no authentication is set, MiniURL automatically starts a guest session for this MCP connection.

tools.name: send_registration_code
tools.description: Send a 6-digit registration code to the user email, using the current guest session.

tools.name: verify_registration_code
tools.description: Verify the emailed code, create the account, claim guest links, and replace the current guest auth with the new mk_ API key.

tools.name: get_account_status
tools.description: Inspect the current guest/free/pro account status, remaining quota, and feature availability.

tools.name: start_pro_upgrade
tools.description: Create a shortened checkout link for upgrading the current registered account to Pro.

tools.name: list_domains
tools.description: List domains available to the current registered account, including miniurl.com and active custom domains.

tools.name: list_links
tools.description: List short links for the current registered account.

tools.name: get_link
tools.description: Get a single short link by alias for the current registered account.

tools.name: update_link
tools.description: Update a registered short link. Some fields require Pro.

tools.name: delete_link
tools.description: Delete a registered short link permanently.

tools.name: bulk_create_links
tools.description: Create multiple short links in one request. Free accounts can create up to 10 at a time, Pro up to 50.

tools.name: get_link_stats
tools.description: Get link analytics. Free accounts receive a basic total plus an upgrade hint; Pro accounts receive full breakdowns.

tools.name: check_alias
tools.description: Check whether a custom alias is available on a given domain before creating a link.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List all tags for the current registered account. Tags help organise links into campaigns or categories.

tools.name: create_tag
tools.description: Create a new tag for organising links. Maximum 20 tags per account.

tools.name: delete_tag
tools.description: Delete a tag and remove it from all associated links.

tools.name: tag_link
tools.description: Add a tag to a short link for campaign or category organisation.

tools.name: untag_link
tools.description: Remove a tag from a short link.
